scenarios.title: disables Save when display name is empty @edge
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to /account/settings/profile, enter display name edit mode, clear the display name input, and verify the Save button is disabled.
expectedAssertions: Save button (getByRole button /save/i) is disabled after display name input is cleared

scenarios.title: enables Save when display name is non-empty @positive
scenarios.userAction: Navigate to /account/settings/profile, enter display name edit mode, type a non-empty display name, and verify the Save button is enabled.
expectedAssertions: Save button (getByRole button /save/i) is enabled after display name input is filled with a non-empty value

locatorTable.notes: Already canonical; specific text is unlikely to collide with other buttons on the page.
Already canonical; label-based match is stable on a profile settings page.
Profile settings page may render multiple Save buttons (one per section). Consider anchoring to /^save$/i or scoping to the display-name section container. See pin 1.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: /save/i may match sibling-section Save buttons on the profile page — assuming only one is visible in display-name edit mode.
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Ask frontend team to add data-testid="display-name-save" and replace with page.getByTestId('display-name-save'), or scope the locator to its parent container.
